text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin has managed to leave<n>quite a mark
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully<n>navigated the
crucial first three years<n>of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Under a beautiful, sunny sky, the<n>BNW trio once
again steps onto the<n>track.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It's just as I calculated! Now, at the<n>next corner—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh! DEEERBYYY!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, the Derby's been over for ages.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but that doesn't change the<n>fact that the
Derby was my dream<n>race!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Besides, yelling it out gives me so<n>much
energyyy!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so vocalizing your aspirations<n>can help
improve your motivation and<n>physical abilities?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I think I'll put that to the test.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If what Ticket says is true, then<n>there's ample
reason to try it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian said it's not like me to keep<n>losing races, so
I have to do<n>something to end my losing streak.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin might've won the Arima<n>Kinen, but she
won't be so lucky next<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The real race between us is just<n>getting started!
Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch. That Ticket never changes.
choice_data_list: You look like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? In what way?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ever since that race, they've been<n>pestering me
to run with them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Whatever. It's good training, I<n>guess.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her harsh words, Narita<n>Taishin's
expression is pleasant.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series may be over, but it<n>seems her
two rivals continue to be a<n>good influence on her
as dear friends.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well? What race am I entering next?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Give me your best shot. I'll win<n>whatever it is.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's path continues<n>onward—now and
forever.
